🔒 Privacy Policy

1. Information We Collect

SmartCare AI collects patient medical data, clinical records, vital signs and imaging data solely for the purpose of providing clinical decision support. All data is processed within your hospital's infrastructure.

2. How We Use Information

  • Real-time patient monitoring and AI risk scoring
  • Clinical AI analysis and radiology interpretation
  • Next-of-kin communication and notification
  • Hospital analytics and reporting

3. Data Storage & Security

SmartCare AI v5.0 operates as a client-side application. Patient data remains in your browser session and is not transmitted to external servers except to the configured AI model providers (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI) for analysis queries. API keys are stored in memory only and cleared on page refresh.

4. Third-Party AI Providers

When using AI analysis features, de-identified clinical summaries may be sent to third-party AI model APIs. You are responsible for ensuring your use of these APIs complies with your institution's data governance policies.

5. Your Rights

Under POPIA, patients and staff have rights to access, correct and delete their personal information. Contact your hospital data protection officer for requests.

6. Contact

For privacy concerns: [email protected]

🛡 POPIA Compliance

Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) — Act 4 of 2013

SmartCare AI is designed with South Africa's Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) as a foundational requirement. Our approach to compliance includes:

Lawful Processing

Patient data is processed only for legitimate clinical purposes with appropriate consent or legal grounds under POPIA Section 11.

Data Minimisation

Only data necessary for clinical care is collected and processed. AI queries are constructed to minimise the inclusion of personally identifiable information.

Purpose Limitation

Data collected for patient care is not used for any other purpose. AI model outputs are used exclusively for clinical decision support.

Security Safeguards

  • 256-bit encryption for all data in transit
  • Session-only memory — no persistent storage of patient data
  • API keys held in memory, not persisted to disk or external servers
  • Role-based access control via your hospital's existing systems

Information Officer

Hospitals deploying SmartCare AI must designate an Information Officer as required by POPIA. Contact [email protected] for guidance.

🏥 HPCSA Guidelines

Health Professions Council of South Africa

SmartCare AI is designed to operate within the ethical and professional framework established by the HPCSA for the use of clinical AI tools in South African healthcare settings.

AI as Decision Support — Not Decision Maker

All AI-generated outputs in SmartCare AI (including X-ray interpretations, risk scores, clinical summaries and recommendations) are clinical decision support tools only. The registered healthcare practitioner remains fully responsible for all clinical decisions.

HPCSA Booklet 6 — Guidelines on Health Research

AI analysis features comply with HPCSA guidelines on the use of technology in clinical practice, including the requirement that AI tools be used as adjuncts to, not replacements for, professional clinical judgement.

Scope of Practice

  • AI radiology reports require verification by a qualified radiologist before clinical action
  • AI risk scores are predictive tools — clinical assessment takes precedence
  • Prescribing recommendations from AI must be validated by a qualified prescriber

Telemedicine Considerations

Where SmartCare AI is used in telemedicine contexts, practitioners must comply with the HPCSA Guidelines on Telemedicine (2019 as amended).

Contact

HPCSA: www.hpcsa.co.za · Tel: 012 338 9300

💬 Support Centre

Getting Started

SmartCare AI requires no installation. Open the HTML file in any modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox). For full AI features, add your API keys in Settings → AI Model API Keys.

AI Model Setup

  • Gemini (Recommended): Get a free key at aistudio.google.com/apikey
  • Claude: Get your key at console.anthropic.com
  • GPT-4o: Get your key at platform.openai.com

X-ray AI Scanner Issues

  • Empty response: Safety filters activated — retry or switch AI model
  • 429 error: Rate limit reached — wait 60 seconds or use a different model
  • 404 error: Outdated model name — ensure you are using v13 or later
  • Image too large: Keep images under 7 MB for best results

WhatsApp Notifications

Configure Twilio API credentials in Settings → WhatsApp Notifications for real message delivery. The in-app WhatsApp simulation works without Twilio.

Contact Support

📧 [email protected]
📞 +27 60 343 1561
🕐 Available Mon–Fri, 08:00–17:00 SAST

💡 Tip: Use Chrome or Edge for best compatibility with AI APIs and file upload features.

What we believe

The Future of Clinical Intelligence Is Here

A new generation of hospital software — where AI doesn't replace clinicians, it empowers them. Real insights, real-time, at the point of care.

AI Models Integrated
Core Modules

Everything a modern hospital needs

Six integrated modules — from ward management to AI diagnostics — working together in one platform.

📊
Live Patient Dashboard
Real-time monitoring across every ward. AI risk scores, vitals trends, discharge planning and clinical alerts updated every 5 seconds.
🔬
X-ray AI Scanner
Upload chest X-rays, CT scans and MRIs — Gemini Vision, Claude and GPT-4o analyse images instantly. Structured reports with findings, diagnosis, differentials and recommendations in under 5 seconds.
🤖
AI Clinical Hub
Multi-model AI answers clinical queries, calculates SOFA/qSOFA scores, predicts patient deterioration and generates statistical analysis with interactive charts.
🛏
Ward & Bed Management
Visual bed maps for all 6 wards. Filter by ward, risk level and status. Per-ward turnover charts, occupancy analytics and one-click patient detail from any bed.
💬
NOK Communication
WhatsApp notifications to next of kin on admission, status changes and discharge. Auto-generated bereavement messages and full conversation history per patient.
📈
Analytics & Reporting
Age distribution, gender charts, top diagnoses, LOS analysis, monthly admissions trend, comorbidity radar and AI model performance metrics.
🔬 AI Radiology Intelligence

Instant AI X-ray Interpretation

Upload any radiological image and receive a full structured radiology report in seconds — powered by the world's most advanced vision AI models.

🟡 Gemini 2.5 Flash 🟠 Claude Sonnet 4 🟢 GPT-4o Vision
●
Dual image comparison
Upload current + prior scan for interval change analysis
●
9 structured report sections
Technical Quality, Findings, Impression, Diagnosis, Differentials, Severity, Recommendations
●
Follow-up AI chat
Ask follow-up clinical questions about any scan in natural language
●
Saves to patient record
Findings auto-linked to patient history, visible in registry and clinical alerts
🤖
AI Radiology Report
Chest X-ray · Gemini · Just now
⚠ ABNORMAL
📋 FINDINGS
Bilateral lower lobe opacification. Right costophrenic angle blunting — pleural effusion. CTR 0.52.
💡 IMPRESSION
Bilateral pneumonia with right-sided parapneumonic effusion.
🏥 PRIMARY DIAGNOSIS
Community-Acquired Pneumonia with Pleural Effusion
✅ RECOMMENDATIONS
• IV antibiotics immediately
• CT chest to characterise effusion
• Urgent respiratory medicine review
Workflow

From upload to report in seconds

Four simple steps — fully automated. No configuration required.

📤
1. Upload Image
Drag and drop any X-ray, CT or MRI. Add a second image for comparison.
🔗
2. Link Patient
Select the patient from the dropdown. Context auto-populates from their record.
🤖
3. AI Analyses
Gemini Vision analyses the image. A full structured report appears in under 5 seconds.
💾
4. Save & Act
Save to patient record, export PDF, notify radiologist or ask follow-up questions.

Ready to transform your hospital?

No setup required — add your API keys and go live in minutes.

⚙️ Settings & API Configuration

      
      
    

    
Configure AI model API keys and system preferences

    

      

        

          
🤖 AI Model API Keys
Secure · Browser Direct


          
          


          


            
            

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
✅ Works directly from browser — CORS enabled by Anthropic

            


            
            

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
⚠️ DeepSeek blocks browser requests (CORS). Requires a backend proxy to function.

            


            
            

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
✅ Works directly from browser with valid key

            


            
            

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
⚠️ DashScope CORS varies — may require backend proxy

            


            
            

              
              

                
                
                
              

              
✅ Gemini 2.5 Flash — supports text and medical image analysis (X-rays, scans). Get key at aistudio.google.com

            


          


          
          

            
🔒 Security & CORS Notes

            

              • Keys are stored in memory only — never sent to any server except the AI provider

              • Claude requires the anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access header — already included ✓

              • DeepSeek does not allow browser-direct API calls due to CORS restrictions — use Claude or ChatGPT instead

              • Keys clear on page refresh — re-enter each session or save in Settings
